testcase.name: test_14_01_budget_correctness_every_forward_step

failure.message: section14_runtime.Section14DiscoveryError: No zero-argument memory reset method was discovered. Provide reset_memory(), clear_memory(), reset_state(), or clear_state().

testcase.name: test_14_10_memory_controller_parameters_receive_gradients

failure.message: AssertionError: Controller parameters did not receive gradients: ['eviction_controller.network.0.weight', 'eviction_controller.network.0.bias', 'eviction_controller.network.2.weight', 'eviction_controller.network.2.bias', 'eviction_controller.network.4.weight', 'eviction_controller.network.4.bias', 'initial_utility_head.0.weight', 'initial_utility_head.0.bias', 'initial_utility_head.2.weight', 'initial_utility_head.2.bias'] assert not ['eviction_controller.network.0.weight', 'eviction_controller.network.0.bias', 'eviction_controller.network.2.weight', 'eviction_controller.network.2.bias', 'eviction_controller.network.4.weight', 'eviction_controller.network.4.bias', ...]

testcase.failure:
def test_14_10_memory_controller_parameters_receive_gradients() -> None: model = build_model(seed=2026, budget=4, force_detach=False) model.train() encourage_writes(model) x = compatible_input(model, seq_len=10) reset_memory(model, require=False) model.zero_grad(set_to_none=True) output = invoke(model, x, reset=True) tensor = extract_tensor(output) assert tensor is not None, "No differentiable tensor was found in model output." assert tensor.requires_grad, "Model output is detached; gradient-flow test cannot proceed."
loss = tensor.float().pow(2).mean() loss.backward()
parameters = controller_parameters(model) assert parameters, ( "No controller parameters were discovered. Controller parameter names or module " "names must include controller/write/retention/utility/policy/selector." ) missing = [name for name, parameter in parameters if parameter.requires_grad and parameter.grad is None] nonfinite = [ name for name, parameter in parameters if parameter.grad is not None and not torch.isfinite(parameter.grad).all() ] nonzero = [ name for name, parameter in parameters if parameter.grad is not None and torch.count_nonzero(parameter.grad).item() > 0 ] > assert not missing, f"Controller parameters did not receive gradients: {missing}" E AssertionError: Controller parameters did not receive gradients: ['eviction_controller.network.0.weight', 'eviction_controller.network.0.bias', 'eviction_controller.network.2.weight', 'eviction_controller.network.2.bias', 'eviction_controller.network.4.weight', 'eviction_controller.network.4.bias', 'initial_utility_head.0.weight', 'initial_utility_head.0.bias', 'initial_utility_head.2.weight', 'initial_utility_head.2.bias'] E assert not ['eviction_controller.network.0.weight', 'eviction_controller.network.0.bias', 'eviction_controller.network.2.weight', 'eviction_controller.network.2.bias', 'eviction_controller.network.4.weight', 'eviction_controller.network.4.bias', ...]
tests/test_section14_required.py:318: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_14_13_memory_reset_between_unrelated_sequences

failure.message: section14_runtime.Section14DiscoveryError: No zero-argument memory reset method was discovered. Provide reset_memory(), clear_memory(), reset_state(), or clear_state().

testcase.name: test_strict_budget_is_never_violated

failure.message: ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one

testcase.failure:
def test_strict_budget_is_never_violated() -> None: torch.manual_seed(2026) model = _model().eval() inputs = torch.randn(5, 11, 6) budgets = torch.tensor([1, 2, 3, 4, 5])
> output = model(inputs, budget=budgets) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/models/test_budgetmem_r.py:36: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/nn/modules/module.py:1778: in _wrapped_call_impl return self._call_impl(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/nn/modules/module.py:1789: in _call_impl return forward_call(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/budgetmem/models/budgetmem_r.py:383: in forward write_gate = self.write_controller.differentiable_gate( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
probability = tensor([0.5277, 0.5293, 0.5300, 0.5322, 0.5325], grad_fn=<SigmoidBackward0>) training = False, threshold = 0.0, temperature = 0.67
@staticmethod def differentiable_gate( probability: Tensor, *, training: bool, threshold: float, temperature: float, ) -> Tensor: """Use a straight-through relaxed Bernoulli gate during training."""
if not 0.0 < threshold < 1.0: > raise ValueError("threshold must be strictly between zero and one") E ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one
src/budgetmem/memory/controllers.py:68: ValueError

testcase.name: test_eval_is_deterministic
testcase.failure:
self = {'logits': tensor([[ 0.1704, -0.0095, 0.0932], [ 0.2229, 0.0051, 0.1016], [ 0.2046, -0.0101, 0.069...ensor([6, 6, 6])), 'memory_mask': tensor([[True, True, True], [True, True, True], [True, True, True]])} name = 'write_slots'
def __getattr__(self, name: str) -> object: try: > return self[name] ^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'write_slots'
src/budgetmem/models/budgetmem_r.py:29: KeyError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception:
def test_eval_is_deterministic() -> None: torch.manual_seed(2026) model = _model(write_threshold=0.5).eval() inputs = torch.randn(3, 7, 6)
first = model(inputs, budget=3) second = model(inputs, budget=3)
assert torch.equal(first.hard_writes, second.hard_writes) > assert torch.equal(first.write_slots, second.write_slots) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/models/test_budgetmem_r.py:52: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = {'logits': tensor([[ 0.1704, -0.0095, 0.0932], [ 0.2229, 0.0051, 0.1016], [ 0.2046, -0.0101, 0.069...ensor([6, 6, 6])), 'memory_mask': tensor([[True, True, True], [True, True, True], [True, True, True]])} name = 'write_slots'
def __getattr__(self, name: str) -> object: try: return self[name] except KeyError as exc: > raise AttributeError(name) from exc E AttributeError: write_slots
src/budgetmem/models/budgetmem_r.py:31: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_training_loss_backpropagates_to_write_controller

failure.message: ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one

testcase.failure:
def test_training_loss_backpropagates_to_write_controller() -> None: torch.manual_seed(2026) model = _model(write_threshold=0.0).train() inputs = torch.randn(4, 8, 6) targets = torch.tensor([0, 1, 2, 1])

testcase.name: test_budget_sampler_uses_only_allowed_values
test_invalid_budget_is_rejected

failure.message: AssertionError: Regex pattern did not match. Expected regex: 'requested budget' Actual message: 'Budgets must be within [1, 5]'

testcase.failure:
def test_invalid_budget_is_rejected() -> None: model = _model().eval() inputs = torch.randn(2, 4, 6) > with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="requested budget"): E AssertionError: Regex pattern did not match. E Expected regex: 'requested budget' E Actual message: 'Budgets must be within [1, 5]'
tests/models/test_budgetmem_r.py:116: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_memory_never_exceeds_configured_budget_at_any_forward_step

failure.message: ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one

testcase.failure:
def test_memory_never_exceeds_configured_budget_at_any_forward_step() -> None: model = build_budgetmem_model().eval() inputs = make_inputs(model, batch_size=3, sequence_length=12)
with torch.no_grad(): for budget in allowed_budgets(model): > output = model(inputs, budget=budget) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

testcase.name: test_future_tokens_do_not_change_earlier_memory_decisions

failure.message: ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one

testcase.failure:
def test_future_tokens_do_not_change_earlier_memory_decisions() -> None: model = build_budgetmem_model().eval() inputs = make_inputs(model, batch_size=2, sequence_length=11, seed=7001) changed = inputs.clone() cutoff = 6
generator = torch.Generator(device="cpu") generator.manual_seed(7002) changed[:, cutoff:, :] = torch.randn( changed[:, cutoff:, :].shape, generator=generator, )
budget = allowed_budgets(model)[0] with torch.no_grad(): > original = model(inputs, budget=budget) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/pretraining/test_budget_and_causality.py:49: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/nn/modules/module.py:1778: in _wrapped_call_impl return self._call_impl(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/nn/modules/module.py:1789: in _call_impl return forward_call(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/budgetmem/models/budgetmem_r.py:383: in forward write_gate = self.write_controller.differentiable_gate( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

@staticmethod def differentiable_gate( probability: Tensor, *, training: bool, threshold: float, temperature: float, ) -> Tensor: """Use a straight-through relaxed Bernoulli gate during training."""
if not 0.0 < threshold < 1.0: > raise ValueError("threshold must be strictly between zero and one") E ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one

testcase.name: test_same_seed_produces_identical_model_initialization_and_evaluation

failure.message: ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one

testcase.failure:
def test_same_seed_produces_identical_model_initialization_and_evaluation() -> None: seed_everything(2026) first_model = build_budgetmem_model().eval() first_state = { name: tensor.detach().clone() for name, tensor in first_model.state_dict().items() }
seed_everything(2026) second_model = build_budgetmem_model().eval() second_state = second_model.state_dict()
assert first_state.keys() == second_state.keys() for name in first_state: assert torch.equal(first_state[name], second_state[name])
inputs = make_inputs(first_model, batch_size=2, sequence_length=10, seed=8080) budget = allowed_budgets(first_model)[0] with torch.no_grad(): > first_output = first_model(inputs, budget=budget) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

failure.message: ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one

def test_memory_controllers_receive_gradients_and_graph_policy_is_explicit() -> None: # Test the write controller under its normal, nonsaturated initialization. torch.manual_seed(12000) write_model = build_budgetmem_model().train()
inputs = make_inputs( write_model, batch_size=2, sequence_length=10, seed=12001, ) budget = allowed_budgets(write_model)[0] > write_output = write_model(inputs, budget=budget) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

testcase.name: test_memory_is_reset_between_unrelated_forward_calls

failure.message: ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one

testcase.failure:
def test_memory_is_reset_between_unrelated_forward_calls() -> None: model = build_budgetmem_model().eval() fresh_model = copy.deepcopy(model).eval() budget = allowed_budgets(model)[0]
unrelated = make_inputs( model, batch_size=2, sequence_length=7, seed=13001, ) target = make_inputs( model, batch_size=2, sequence_length=9, seed=13002, )
with torch.no_grad(): > model(unrelated, budget=budget)
tests/pretraining/test_gradient_and_reset.py:111: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/nn/modules/module.py:1778: in _wrapped_call_impl return self._call_impl(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/nn/modules/module.py:1789: in _call_impl return forward_call(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/budgetmem/models/budgetmem_r.py:383: in forward write_gate = self.write_controller.differentiable_gate( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

if not 0.0 < threshold < 1.0: > raise ValueError("threshold must be strictly between zero and one") E ValueError: threshold must be strictly between zero and one

testcase.name: test_imdb_official_test_examples_are_not_in_train_or_validation

failure.message: pyarrow.lib.ArrowInvalid: No match for FieldRef.Name(source_index) in __fragment_index: int32 __batch_index: int32 __last_in_fragment: bool __filename: string

testcase.failure:
def test_imdb_official_test_examples_are_not_in_train_or_validation() -> None: root = REPO_ROOT / "data" / "processed" / "imdb" paths = { "train": root / "train" / "data.parquet", "validation": root / "validation" / "data.parquet", "test": root / "test_locked" / "data.parquet", } manifest_path = REPO_ROOT / "data" / "manifests" / "imdb_manifest.json" indices_path = REPO_ROOT / "data" / "manifests" / "imdb_split_indices.json"
required = [*paths.values(), manifest_path, indices_path] if not all(item.exists() for item in required): pytest.skip("IMDb data or provenance manifests are not all present")
> train = pd.read_parquet(paths["train"], columns=["source_index"]) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/pretraining/test_split_leakage.py:119: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pandas/io/parquet.py:671: in read_parquet return impl.read( .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pandas/io/parquet.py:260: in read pa_table = self.api.parquet.read_table( .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pyarrow/parquet/core.py:1964: in read_table return dataset.read(columns=columns, use_threads=use_threads, .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pyarrow/parquet/core.py:1590: in read table = self._dataset.to_table( pyarrow/_dataset.pyx:579: in pyarrow._dataset.Dataset.to_table ??? pyarrow/_dataset.pyx:415: in pyarrow._dataset.Dataset.scanner ??? pyarrow/_dataset.pyx:3706: in pyarrow._dataset.Scanner.from_dataset ??? pyarrow/_dataset.pyx:3619: in pyarrow._dataset.Scanner._make_scan_options ??? pyarrow/_dataset.pyx:3569: in pyarrow._dataset._populate_builder ??? _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
> ??? E pyarrow.lib.ArrowInvalid: No match for FieldRef.Name(source_index) in __fragment_index: int32 E __batch_index: int32 E __last_in_fragment: bool E __filename: string
pyarrow/error.pxi:92: ArrowInvalid
